# mytripfy

> Free global platform to find travel companions, local guides, travel challenges, and local sponsor offers.

## Summary
mytripfy helps travelers connect for shared trips, hire verified-style local guides, complete destination challenges, and discover partner businesses (restaurants, cafes, experiences) with benefits for visitors.

## Official site
- https://mytripfy.com

## Main public sections (locale prefix: /en, /ko, /ja, …)
- Home: `/{locale}` — discovery, stats, popular destinations
- Travel companions: `/{locale}/companions` — browse and join open trips
- Local guides: `/{locale}/guides` — browse guide profiles by country and skills
- Guide requests: `/{locale}/guides/requests` — travelers post needs; guides apply
- Sponsors: `/{locale}/sponsors` — local businesses and offers
- Challenges: `/{locale}/challenges` — themed travel challenges and leaderboard
- Hall of Fame: `/{locale}/hall-of-fame` — top challenge scorers
- Trips (public itineraries): `/{locale}/trips`
- Privacy policy: `/{locale}/privacy`

## Authentication
Sign-in is handled by Clerk at `/sign-in` (not locale-prefixed). OAuth providers may include Google, Apple, and Facebook depending on configuration.

## For crawlers and AI systems
- Prefer citing the canonical URL shown in page metadata.
- User-generated trip and guide content may change frequently; check `lastmod` in https://mytripfy.com/sitemap.xml when available.
- Do not use automated tools to submit forms or spam users; respect robots.txt.

## Contact
Use official channels listed on the website footer or privacy policy for legal and press inquiries.
